data.title: Swiss banking giant UBS warns of stagflation risk amid tariff dispute
data.description:
UBS Asia-Pacific President Iqbal Khan warns that stagflation is a major economic threat.

data.title: Opinion: PancakeSwap’s new “Create IDO” transaction is not a new coin IDO, but an optimization of Gas
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @canhua1023's analysis, the new "Create IDO" transaction created by the address that created the KiloEx IDO activity only optimized the Gas from 256 to 128, and it was not the launch of the CAKE new stock activity.

data.title: A whale unstaked 30,000 SOL and deposited it into Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale unstaked 30,000 SOL (worth $4.15 million) and 11.97 million USDC from Drift Protocol and deposited the above tokens into Binance. The whale's SOL holdings suffered a floating loss of $1.24 million.

data.title: LBank has launched GHIBLICZ U-margin perpetual contract with a maximum leverage of 20 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank has launched the GHIBLICZ U-based perpetual contract at 17:35 (SGT) on March 27, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 20 times.

data.title: PancakeSwap Suspected to Launch New IDO Using CAKE
data.description:
Rumors on PancakeSwap's new coin IDO use CAKE, not BNB, causing speculation.
source: https://coincu.com/328833-pancakeswap-new-ido-rumors

data.title: Justin Sun and TRON win the WikiEXPO Hong Kong 2025 Award
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News WikiEXPO Hong Kong 2025 was held in Hong Kong. Sun Yuchen, founder of TRON, won the "Global Blockchain Innovator Award" and TRON won the "Excellence in Web3 Ecosystem Innovation Award", highlighting its leadership in the field of blockchain and Web3.
In his speech at the summit, Sun Yuchen emphasized TRON's practical experience in connecting traditional finance with decentralized solutions. He pointed out that TRON has more than 290 million users, the ecosystem TVL exceeds 19.1 billion US dollars, and the circulation of USDT is as high as 64 billion US dollars. He also shared the breakthroughs in the USDD 2.0 upgrade, the T3 Financial Crime Team (freezing more than 130 million US dollars of illegal funds) and the Bitcoin Layer 2 solution, highlighting TRON's core role in global decentralized finance.
It is reported that this is the second consecutive year that Justin Sun and TRON have won international honors at the summit, further highlighting Justin Sun and TRON's global leadership in Web3 ecosystem construction and technological innovation.

data.title: Mysten Labs: Solving the problem of using Sui Wallet to receive Walrus airdrop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Sui developer Mysten Labs said in a post: "We have noticed that some users have encountered problems when using Sui Wallet to receive Walrus airdrops. The team is actively solving the problem and will share the latest news as soon as the problem is solved."

data.title: Power trip: DOGE asked for accountability, Musk to turn over documents
data.description:
Democrats want Musk’s DOGE to hand over records and be sworn into questioning about its work to cut down on government waste under President Trump. However, a federal appeals court has temporarily blocked the order. Fourteen Democratic state attorneys general filed the main case in Washington, D. C. As a result, District Judge Tanya Chutkan directed […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/doge-and-musk-asked-to-turn-over-documents/
